caption: A man with blond hair, wearing glasses, white over-ear headphones, and a grey sweatshirt, is speaking into a professional black microphone. He is positioned in front of a framed screen displaying the number "20" against a blue and white background. To his left, a decorated green Christmas tree with colorful red, blue, and yellow lights is visible. As the sequence progresses, the man remains in the same position, but his facial expressions shift as he speaks. He begins with a slight smile and open mouth, transitions to a more focused expression with his mouth slightly open, and ends with a wide-open mouth as if emphasizing a point. His movement is minimal, focused primarily on his jaw and lips, while the background and equipment remain static throughout the clip.
